# Cavalry & Cannon Basic Sprite Assets â€” Implementation Plan

**Spec:** `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-27-cavalry-cannon-sprites-design.md`

**Goal:** Bring cuirassier and cannon-12 to visual parity with line-infantry â€” 8-facing sprite atlases with team-tinted markers, generated by both runtime TS modules (used by the GL sprite-pass) and Node draw scripts (preview PNGs).

**Architecture:** A new `sprite-atlas` module concatenates three per-kind 3Ă—3 cell grids (soldier 33Ă—54, cuirassier 45Ă—60, cannon 51Ă—42) into a single 51Ă—156 combined RGBA atlas. Per-kind metadata (cell size, pose cells, region offset) is held centrally so the sprite-pass picks the right cell at draw time by entity `kindId` + `facing`.

**Tech:** WebGL2, TypeScript, Vitest, Node ESM for draw scripts.

---

## Task 1 â€” Cuirassier sprite module

**Files:** create `src/render/cuirassier-sprite.ts`.

Mirror the structure of `british-soldier-sprite.ts`: cell constants, pose grids, palette, marker constants, `generateCuirassierSheet({ resolvePrimary?, resolveSecondary? })`.

- 15-wide Ă— 20-tall cells, 3 cols Ă— 3 rows, sheet size 45 Ă— 60.
- Pose grids: `POSE_FRONT`, `POSE_FRONT_DIAG`, `POSE_SIDE`, `POSE_BACK`, `POSE_BACK_DIAG`.
- Each pose row is exactly 15 chars; each pose has exactly 20 rows. Validate at module load via the same throw-if-mismatched loop the soldier module uses.
- Layout (matches soldier):
  ```
  (0,0) NW back-3/4 mirrored   (1,0) WHITE TINT       (2,0) NE back-3/4
  (0,1) W side mirrored        (1,1) S front          (2,1) E side
  (0,2) SW front-3/4 mirrored  (1,2) N back           (2,2) SE front-3/4
  ```
- Palette characters:
  - `.` transparent
  - `k` outline (22, 18, 28, 255)
  - `h` horse coat (110, 75, 45, 255)
  - `H` horse shadow (74, 50, 30, 255)
  - `f` skin (228, 188, 156, 255)
  - `F` skin shadow (186, 142, 108, 255)
  - `g` steel (sabre / helmet) (180, 188, 200, 255)
  - `m` saddle leather (60, 40, 26, 255)
  - `w` belts / breeches (236, 232, 222, 255)
  - `s` ground shadow (60, 56, 52, 110)
  - `W` tint cell (255, 255, 255, 255)
  - `P` primary marker (magenta default 255,0,255 / overridable)
  - `S` secondary marker (cyan default 0,255,255 / overridable)
- Export the same shape the soldier module exports: `CUIRASSIER_CELL_W`, `CUIRASSIER_CELL_H`, `CUIRASSIER_COLS`, `CUIRASSIER_ROWS`, `CUIRASSIER_SHEET_W`, `CUIRASSIER_SHEET_H`, `CUIRASSIER_TINT_CELL`, `CUIRASSIER_FRONT_CELL`, `CUIRASSIER_POSE_CELLS`, plus the `generateCuirassierSheet(opts)` function.

Pose silhouettes â€” keep the rider centered around col 7 of the 15-wide grid; horse body extends below. Side view shows horse galloping right, rider on top with sabre raised on viewer-right. 3/4 views shift the head and sabre by 1 column. Back/front compress the horse to head-on / tail-on with rider flanking.

## Task 2 â€” Cannon-12 sprite module

**Files:** create `src/render/cannon-12-sprite.ts`.

Same shape, dimensions 17 Ă— 14 cells, 3Ă—3 grid, sheet 51 Ă— 42.

- Palette characters:
  - `.` transparent
  - `k` outline (22, 18, 28, 255)
  - `g` gunmetal barrel (60, 62, 70, 255)
  - `G` barrel highlight (110, 112, 120, 255)
  - `m` carriage timber (120, 84, 50, 255)
  - `M` carriage shadow (78, 52, 30, 255)
  - `w` wheel iron tyre (180, 188, 200, 255)
  - `s` ground shadow (60, 56, 52, 110)
  - `W` tint cell (255, 255, 255, 255)
  - `P` primary marker (carriage trim accent)
  - `S` secondary marker (wheel rims / barrel furniture)
- Side view: barrel pointing right, both wheels stacked vertically (front + rear) with the trail tucked left. 3/4 views angle the barrel. Front/back show muzzle/breech as a small `g` disc with wheels flanking left + right and trail pointing toward / away.

## Task 3 â€” Combined sprite atlas module

**Files:** create `src/render/sprite-atlas.ts`.

Exports:

```ts
export interface KindAtlasMeta {
  cellW: number;
  cellH: number;
  poseCells: readonly { col: number; row: number }[]; // 8 entries (N..NW clockwise)
  frontCell: { col: number; row: number };
  tintCell: { col: number; row: number };
  region: { x: number; y: number; w: number; h: number };
}

export const COMBINED_SHEET_W = 51;
export const COMBINED_SHEET_H = 156;
export const KIND_ATLAS: Record<string, KindAtlasMeta>;
export function generateCombinedAtlas(opts?: {
  resolvePrimary?: readonly [number, number, number];
  resolveSecondary?: readonly [number, number, number];
}): Uint8Array;
```

Implementation details:
- Width = max(soldier 33, cuirassier 45, cannon 51) = 51.
- Region y-offsets: soldier 0, cuirassier 54, cannon 114.
- `generateCombinedAtlas` allocates a `51 Ă— 156 Ă— 4` buffer (initialized to zero â€” kinds whose region width < 51 leave transparent right-pad), then blits each per-kind generator's output at its region offset.
- `KIND_ATLAS['line-infantry']` populates from soldier exports; `KIND_ATLAS['cuirassier']` from cuirassier exports; `KIND_ATLAS['cannon-12']` from cannon-12 exports.
- `poseCells` order matches the soldier `POSE_CELLS`: N, NE, E, SE, S, SW, W, NW.

## Task 4 â€” Sprite-pass refactor

**Files:** modify `src/render/passes/sprite-pass.ts`.

- Replace soldier-only imports with `sprite-atlas` imports (`KIND_ATLAS`, `COMBINED_SHEET_W`, `COMBINED_SHEET_H`, `generateCombinedAtlas`).
- Atlas texture: `createTextureRGBA(gl, COMBINED_SHEET_W, COMBINED_SHEET_H, generateCombinedAtlas(), { wrap: gl.CLAMP_TO_EDGE })`.
- Replace `cellUv(col, row)` with `cellUv(meta, col, row)` that uses `meta.cellW`, `meta.cellH`, `meta.region.{x,y}`, and the combined sheet dims.
- In the per-instance loop, look up `meta = KIND_ATLAS[kind.id]`. If absent, fall back to soldier meta (defensive â€” should not happen at runtime).
- Pose selection: `meta.poseCells[facing - 1]` if `1 â‰¤ facing â‰¤ 8` else `meta.frontCell`.
- Drop the local `POSE_CELLS` import; per-kind tables now live on the meta.
- Tint cell logic: when no kind sprite cell is set (very edge case), use `meta.tintCell` instead of the soldier tint cell.
- Keep `TEAM_COLORS`, `FALLBACK_TEAM`, recoil math, scratch buffers, and the rest of the pass intact.

## Task 5 â€” Wire spriteCell on cuirassier + cannon

**Files:** modify `src/data/units/cuirassier.ts`, `src/data/units/cannon-12.ts`.

- `cuirassier.spriteCell = { col: 1, row: 1 }` (front cell of the cuirassier region â€” coords are local to the kind region).
- `cannon12.spriteCell = { col: 1, row: 1 }`.
- Coords are kind-local because the sprite-pass adds `meta.region.{x,y}` itself.

## Task 6 â€” Atlas tests

**Files:** create `src/render/sprite-atlas.test.ts`.

Vitest cases:
1. `combined sheet dimensions match constants` â€” `generateCombinedAtlas().length === COMBINED_SHEET_W * COMBINED_SHEET_H * 4`.
2. `kind regions don't overlap and cover declared offsets` â€” for each KIND_ATLAS entry, `region.y + region.h <= COMBINED_SHEET_H` and `region.x + region.w <= COMBINED_SHEET_W`; pairwise non-overlap by y-range (ok since they're stacked vertically).
3. `markers survive at front cell of each kind` â€” generate atlas with default markers (magenta/cyan); for each kind, walk that kind's front-cell pixels and assert at least one (255,0,255) and one (0,255,255) exist. Guards against accidental marker stripping.
4. `resolvePrimary bakes color` â€” pass `resolvePrimary = [10, 20, 30]`; assert no (255,0,255) pixels remain anywhere in the combined atlas; assert at least one (10,20,30) exists in each kind region.

## Task 7 â€” Draw scripts

**Files:** create `scripts/draw-cuirassier.mjs`, `scripts/draw-cannon-12.mjs`.

Each is a clone of `scripts/draw-british-soldier.mjs` with:
- The kind-specific palette (P/S baked to British defaults: red `[180,40,50]` primary, blue `[50,60,140]` secondary â€” matches soldier).
- The kind-specific cell dimensions and pose grids (duplicated from the runtime TS module since the script must run under plain Node ESM with no TS).
- Output paths:
  - cuirassier: `public/sprites/cuirassier.png` (45Ă—60), `public/sprites/cuirassier-preview.png` (270Ă—360 at 6Ă—).
  - cannon-12: `public/sprites/cannon-12.png` (51Ă—42), `public/sprites/cannon-12-preview.png` (306Ă—252 at 6Ă—).

Reuse the inline PNG encoder + scaler from the soldier script verbatim.

## Task 8 â€” Verify

Run:
- `npm run typecheck` â€” must pass.
- `npm test` â€” atlas tests pass; existing tests unchanged and still pass.
- `node scripts/draw-cuirassier.mjs` and `node scripts/draw-cannon-12.mjs` â€” exit 0, preview PNGs written.

Manual: open the dev server, place cuirassier and cannon entities for both teams, confirm primary/secondary tinting and that facings rotate correctly with movement.
